name: cc-harness
description: cc-harness — a layered harness for Claude Code: cc-tools (single-purpose product skills) -> cc-agent (the musician, one self-driving agent) -> cc-maestro (the ccmaestro console that watches and controls many agents at once).

plugins.name: cc-tools
plugins.description: The tools layer: /find-goal, /what-to-do, /how-to-do, /do, /slap, /crux — single-purpose product skills forming a ground -> diverge -> decide -> build funnel, plus /slap and /crux side doors. Zero-config.

plugins.name: cc-agent
plugins.description: The self-driving agent layer: the musician (/musician) drives one piece of work through the cc-tools funnel to its own falsifiable definition of done, then closes itself — bounded and self-closing, not a never-stop loop. With a prompt it thinks the task through first (and may decline a bad idea); without one it finds a direction itself. /musician-cancel is the manual brake. Depends on cc-tools.

plugins.name: cc-maestro
plugins.description: The conductor layer: the ccmaestro console observes and controls many coding agents and musicians at once (tokens, stalls, loops, stop/steer).
